{{Event Header|StS2 Punch Off.png}} {{E|Punch Off|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. It is a combat event. == Options == {{Frame|Nab}} {{TS|negative||Add {{C|Injury||2}} (curse) to Deck.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}}
{{Frame|I Can Take Them}} Enter combat against 2 {{M|Punch Construct|Punch Constructs|2}} for greater rewards. * Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}, a random {{2|Potions|Potion}}, and a standard combat reward. == Conditions == * Only appears at Floor 6 or later. == Dialogue ==
Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them... Should you try to nab it?
{{Frame|Nab}}
You successfully nab the relic! ...or so you thought. A right-hook clocks you in the face.
{{Frame|I Can Take Them}}
The Constructs turn to you menacingly! You put your dukes up.
